channel.title: Crowd Control
channel.description: Latest releases from Crowd Control on Dropout.tv

item.title: This Bush Loves Bush
item.description:
Jenny, Megan, and Joyelle learn about the Voltron fandom and lift a witch’s curse.

Duration: 34:46

Tags: Crowd Control, jacquis neal, stand up comedy, crowd work, unscripted, competitions, storytelling, cool jobs, alternative lifestyles, red flags, jenny zigrino, megan gailey, joyelle nicole johnson
